keywords: LIFO REFUND_PAYMENT RESTORE_INVENTORY compensation order saga escrow dispute updateDocument deleteDocument prohibited escrow_auto_release_days FREEDOM CF-16-3
ironRules: LIFO compensation order: [REFUND_PAYMENT, RESTORE_INVENTORY] — REFUND executes first
FIFO order (RESTORE then REFUND) creates oversell window — prohibited
Dispute path: updateDocument(status:DISPUTED, accessBlocked:true) ONLY — never deleteDocument
Compensation saga triggered by PaymentReversalRequested ONLY — not by DisputeInitiated
escrow_auto_release_days from FREEDOM config — not hardcoded
